purpose: Defines the required top-level polity identity interface so all major polities expose the same class of answers even when certain categories are explicitly absent at nation level.
rule: Missing explicit canon is allowed only when represented explicitly as a bounded absence, never by omission.
validator_expectation: A top-level polity fails parity validation if any required field is absent, if population status is omitted, or if unsupported population rosters are inferred from local signals.
